Warog SSR + hydration demo

Server-rendered HTML, client hydration, controlled inputs, keyed lists, context and an SSR-safe error boundary.

SSR + hydration forms

{
  "text": "Hello Warog",
  "done": false,
  "flavor": "vanilla",
  "notes": "Hydrated from SSR"
}

Keyed list hydration stability

theme: light

This block intentionally changes shape to exercise hydration diagnostics.

  • Milk
  • Bread
  • Cheese

Error boundary

Type “boom” to trigger the boundary fallback.
